scripts.docker:build: docker build -t ghcr.io/wifsimster/toko:latest --build-arg VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") --build-arg BUILD_DATE=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") --build-arg VCS_REF=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) .
scripts.docker:push: docker push ghcr.io/wifsimster/toko:latest && docker push ghcr.io/wifsimster/toko:v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
scripts.release: pnpm build && pnpm docker:build && pnpm docker:tag && pnpm docker:push
scripts.version:patch: pnpm version patch --no-git-tag-version && pnpm -r version patch --no-git-tag-version
scripts.version:minor: pnpm version minor --no-git-tag-version && pnpm -r version minor --no-git-tag-version
scripts.version:major: pnpm version major --no-git-tag-version && pnpm -r version major --no-git-tag-version
